ranked_findings.finding: bot.py remains a monolithic multi-megabyte Flask module.
ranked_findings.recommended_next_step: Split cold-start-heavy route/template/static builders into import-light modules after route parity tests exist.

ranked_findings.finding: A single JS file exceeds the 120KB review threshold.
ranked_findings.recommended_next_step: Split route-specific logic or lazy-load below-the-fold behaviors without changing current UI.

ranked_findings.finding: One script registers a high number of explicit event listeners.
ranked_findings.recommended_next_step: Consolidate repeated handlers into delegated listeners where the DOM structure is stable.

ranked_findings.finding: SELECT * usage remains present and can inflate payload and row materialization cost.
ranked_findings.recommended_next_step: Replace hot-path SELECT * calls with explicit projected columns after endpoint snapshots are captured.

ranked_findings.finding: Duplicate JS utility/function names exist across files.
ranked_findings.recommended_next_step: Move stable utilities into existing shared modules only after bundle-load boundaries are confirmed.

ranked_findings.finding: Repeated CSS selectors exist and should be consolidated carefully.
ranked_findings.recommended_next_step: Consolidate duplicated design tokens and route-specific overrides after visual regression checks.

scope: PulseSoc Project Titan static performance audit
